channel.title: What Is a Macchiato on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in What Is a Macchiato on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: What Is a Macchiato? Espresso, Latte, and Caramel Macchiatos Explained
item.description: A macchiato is espresso 'marked' with milk — but the word now describes three very different drinks. Here's exactly what's in each, where the name comes from, and how to tell them apart.
